system:
Ban la tro ly migrate ung dung MSSQL sang ERP framework. Nhiem vu: doc body T-SQL cua 1 stored procedure + ket qua parse heuristic, gan ten tieng Viet + tier + mo ta nghiep vu.

Tuan thu **STYLE.md** duoi day (chu y verb prefix + tier guideline):

---

---

Khung dich:
- Tier B: procedure JS chay isolated-vm (128MB/5s). API: db.queryRecords, db.findById, db.tx, entity.insert/update/delete, callTool, callProc, fetch, console.log. KHONG raw SQL.
- Tier C: workflow scheduled — proc chay theo lich (SQL Agent). Body workflow goi xuong tier B/D.
- Tier D: plugin TS in-process — Drizzle sql`` full power, transaction, file system.

Input ban se nhan:
- `procName` — schema.name.
- `body` — T-SQL body (truncate ~6000 char).
- `parseAnalysis` — { readsTables, writesTables, flags, suggestedTier } tu parser heuristic.
- `tablesEnriched` — map ten MSSQL → ten entity tieng Viet (de hieu nghiep vu).

Output JSON object DUY NHAT theo schema:
```json
{
  "originalName": "<schema.proc>",
  "targetProcName": "<snake_case bat dau bang verb, neu tier=B>",
  "targetFile": "<packages/plugins/module-<m>/<name>.ts, neu tier=D>",
  "label": "<tieng Viet co dau ngan>",
  "description": "<1-2 cau noi nghiep vu>",
  "tier": "B" | "C" | "D",
  "tierReason": "<vi sao chon tier nay>",
  "schedule": "<cron expression, chi neu tier=C va detect duoc>"
}
```

Quy tac:
- `targetProcName` BAT BUOC bat dau bang verb (xem STYLE.md muc 3): lay_*, dem_*, tinh_*, tao_*, cap_nhat_*, xoa_*, kiem_tra_*, gui_*, dong_*, mo_*, nhap_*, xuat_*, duyet_*.
- Override `tier` neu thay parser sai (vd CTE chi de readability → B).
- `targetFile` chi can khi tier D — dat trong `packages/plugins/module-<module>/<targetProcName>.ts`.
- `description` noi VIEC GI (nghiep vu) chu khong noi T-SQL lam gi. Vi du tot: "Tinh tong tien cua 1 don hang theo cong thuc don gia * so luong * (1 - chiet khau)." Vi du te: "SELECT total FROM orders WHERE id = @id."

KHONG kem markdown, KHONG giai thich. Chi 1 JSON object.
user:
{"procName":"dbo.tr_pallet_getneworder","body":"
CREATE   PROC [dbo].[TR_PALLET_GETNEWORDER]
(
	@donhang nvarchar(200),
	@ngaytao datetime,
	@nguoitao nvarchar(50),
	@ngaysua datetime,
	@nguoisua nvarchar(50)
)
AS
BEGIN
BEGIN TRANSACTION
BEGIN TRY

DECLARE @soluong int;
DECLARE @masp nvarchar(200);
DECLARE @tensp nvarchar(max);
DECLARE @dai float, @rong float, @cao float, @sokhoi float;


DECLARE CUR CURSOR LOCAL FOR
	SELECT A.item_number, A.[description], B.dai, B.rong, B.cao, B.m3_tc, SUM(A.order_qty) 
	FROM tr_order_detail A
		INNER JOIN tr_sanpham B ON A.item_number = B.masp
	WHERE A.order_number = @donhang AND A.f_cancelled = 'N'
	GROUP BY A.item_number, A.[description], B.dai, B.rong, B.cao, B.m3_tc
OPEN CUR
FETCH NEXT FROM CUR INTO @masp, @tensp, @dai, @rong, @cao, @sokhoi, @soluong
WHILE @@FETCH_STATUS = 0
BEGIN
	IF EXISTS (SELECT id FROM tr_pallet WHERE donhang = @donhang AND masp = @masp AND isOrderNumber = 1 AND mact = '000')
	BEGIN
		UPDATE tr_pallet
		SET soluong_donhang = @soluong,
			soluong_can = @soluong,
			sokhoi_tinhche = @sokhoi * @soluong,
			ngaysua = @ngaysua,
			nguoisua = @nguoisua
		WHERE donhang = @donhang AND masp = @masp AND isOrderNumber = 1
	END
	ELSE
	BEGIN
		INSERT INTO tr_pallet
		(
			donhang, 
			isOrderNumber, 
			masp, tenct, mact,
			dayy_tc, rong_tc, dai_tc, soluong_tc, sokhoi_tinhche,
			soluong_donhang, 
			soluong_can, 
			isCreateCard, 
			ngaytao, 
			nguoitao, 
			ngaysua, 
			nguoisua, 
			active
		)
		VALUES
		(
			@donhang, 
			1, 
			@masp, @tensp, '000',
			@dai, @rong, @cao, 1, @sokhoi * @soluong,
			@soluong,
			@soluong, 
			0, 
			@ngaytao,
			@nguoitao,
			@ngaysua, 
			@nguoisua, 
			1
		)
	END
	PRINT CONCAT(@MASP, ' - ', @soluong);
	FETCH NEXT FROM CUR INTO @masp, @tensp, @dai, @rong, @cao, @sokhoi, @soluong
END
CLOSE CUR
DEALLOCATE CUR
	COMMIT TRANSACTION
	PRINT 'COMMIT TRANSACTION'
END TRY
BEGIN CATCH
	ROLLBACK TRANSACTION
	PRINT 'ROLLBACK TRANSACTION'
END CATCH

SELECT A.*, B.tensp, B.tensp_vn, B.mausac, B.hehang, B.quycach
FROM tr_pallet A
	INNER JOIN tr_sanpham B ON A.masp = B.masp
WHERE A.donhang = @donhang --AND A.masp = @masp
	AND A.isOrderNumber = 1
	AND A.mact = '000'
END","parseAnalysis":{"readsTables":["dbo.cur","dbo.tr_order_detail","dbo.tr_pallet","dbo.tr_sanpham"],"writesTables":["dbo.tr_pallet"],"flags":["has-transaction","has-try-catch","has-cursor","has-while","has-group-by"],"suggestedTier":"D"},"tablesEnriched":{"dbo.dqt_pallet_chitiet":"dqt_pallet_chitiet","dbo.dqt_thongke_phoi":"dqt_thongke_phoi","dbo.mes_hoso_donhang":"mes_hoso_donhang","dbo.ps_kehoach_donhang":"ps_kehoach_donhang","dbo.ps_kehoach_donhang_trangthai":"ps_kehoach_donhang_trangthai","dbo.tr_bophan":"tr_bophan","dbo.tr_chitiet_hangtrang":"tr_chitiet_hangtrang","dbo.tr_common":"tr_common","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_donggoi":"tr_dinhmuc_donggoi","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_govan":"tr_dinhmuc_govan","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_hangtrang":"tr_dinhmuc_hangtrang","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_ngukim":"tr_dinhmuc_ngukim","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_son":"tr_dinhmuc_son","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_son_new":"tr_dinhmuc_son_new","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_son_theomau":"tr_dinhmuc_son_theomau","dbo.tr_dondathang":"tr_dondathang","dbo.tr_dondathang_chitiet":"tr_dondathang_chitiet","dbo.tr_gridview_column":"tr_gridview_column","dbo.tr_luutrinh_sanxuat":"tr_luutrinh_sanxuat","dbo.tr_material":"tr_material","dbo.tr_nguyenlieu_gva":"tr_nguyenlieu_gva","dbo.tr_order":"tr_order","dbo.tr_order_detail":"tr_order_detail","dbo.tr_sanpham":"tr_sanpham","dbo.tr_tinhtrang_fsc":"tr_tinhtrang_fsc"}}
